criteria is divided into three sections, design brief, design challenges & design results

关于.preview:
Enter online
About the awards

Globally acknowledged as the leading international competition dedicated to the design of food and beverage spaces. Now in its 18th year, it recognises and celebrates the world's most creative spaces and the individuals and organizations behind them - encompassing everything from ultra-luxe fine dining destinations to concept-led fast casual hangouts.

类别.preview:
Enter online
Categories

Celebrating the world's most creative spaces and the people behind them.

There are nine categories for each of the five regions of the world—Americas, Asia, Australia & Pacific, Europe, Middle East & Africa—and eleven global categories that are not region specific.

Regional categories
Cafe—a space that predominantly serves coffee, tea etc.
Colour—judges will look specifically at how colour has been used within the space.
Hotel—a food and beverage space within a hotel.

参赛.preview:
Enter online
Making an entry

Open to projects launched or extensively renovated between the 1st January 2025 and 31st March 2026.

All work must be entered as a collaboration between the designer and the hospitality project operator.

All entries must be made in English.

There are seven simple steps involved in submitting your entries. Make sure all entry materials (text and images) are clear, concise and of the best possible quality. Poor quality visual media will weaken your application, ple

费用.preview:
Enter online
Entry fees

This year's entry fees.

Early bird submission runs from 5th January to 31st January 2026 - £330+VAT (if applicable).
Regular submission runs from 1st February to 30th April 2026 - £380+VAT (if applicable).
Entries submitted after 30th April 2026 - £420+VAT (if applicable).

All entries must be paid in full before they can be submitted.

Each payment is confirmed by the issuing of a tax receipt which is available to download as a PDF from the entry system dashboard.

Terms and conditions

Please also read our cookies and privacy policy.

Awards entries

Any professional may enter, including interior designers, interior architects, architects, food and beverage space operators and owners etc.

All work must be entered as a collaboration between the designer and the food and beverage space operator. If you collaborated on a piece of work with another company or individual, you will need to make sure they haven’t entered it in the same category as
